documents.title: China Invoice Review Baseline
documents.summary: Country-level invoice review expectations used by the example Pack set.
documents.body: Invoice release requires tax review readiness, customer registration completeness, and country-specific field validation before outbound issuance.

documents.title: Group SaaS Revenue Recognition Policy
documents.summary: Annual SaaS prepayments are booked to contract liability until service is delivered.
documents.body: For annual subscription prepayments, recognize cash receipt against contract liability first and amortize revenue monthly over the service period once delivery begins.
